title: Reproducible Builds, CI Gates, Artifacts, GitHub Pages, and Promotion · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent documentation team receives a different content tree, language, route base, template, asset set, trust policy, hosting target, and accessibility need and transfers reproducible builds, ci gates, artifacts, github pages, and promotion into a changed immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through pr…
objectives: Eliminate unstable order, paths, locale, time, random values, permissions, and environment leakage; use recorded source and tool identity and compare clean digests.
Pin workflow dependencies, minimize permissions, isolate untrusted changes, protect environments, retain logs safely, and separate build from deployment authority.
Build once, validate, identify, attest, retain, approve, and deploy the exact same immutable artifact instead of rebuilding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Reproducible Build
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab publishing team handles case 7634 during a large technical reference incremental rebuild. Build deterministic Python evidence to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then publish below a project subpath and verify every internal URL, fragment, asset, feed, and canonical. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Eliminate unstable order, paths, locale, time, random values, permissions, and environment leakage; use recorded source and tool identity and compare clean digests.

What must be established before implementation?

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Postdeploy Smoke
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: ssg-postdeploy-smoke-kl7dr4" that uses case 8367 to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, cache, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, CommonMark 0.31.2 fixtures, markdown-it-py 4.2.0, Jinja 3.1.6 strict autoescape, pytest 9.1.1, standards validators, real browsers, clean package installs, reproducible artifacts, staged deployment, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Postdeploy Smoke.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Postdeploy Smoke into observable performance evidence. For Static-site publishing and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Postdeploy Smoke, keep Postdeploy Smoke connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-postdeploy-smoke-kl7dr4
# Competency: ssg-postdeploy-smoke.
# Case 8367: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: delete a source and change a shared layout, then compare incremental and clean artifact digests.
def evidence_ssg_postdeploy_smoke_kl7dr4(clean_builds: int = 2, equal_digests: bool = True, artifact_promotions: int = 1, rebuilds_after_approval: int = 0, smoke_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_kl7dr4 = "kl7dr4-4rd7lk-8367"
    assert evidence_variant_kl7dr4
    evidence_axes_kl7dr4 = (
        "readerkl7dr4",
        "source8367",
        "parse4rd7lk",
        "routekl7dr48367",
        "artifact8367kl7dr4",
        "recovery4rd7lk8367",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_kl7dr4)) == 6
    if clean_builds < 2:
        return False, clean_builds, "reproducibility-sample"
    if not equal_digests:
        return False, clean_builds, "digest-drift"
    if artifact_promotions != 1 or rebuilds_after_approval > 0:
        return False, artifact_promotions, "promotion-boundary"
    if smoke_failures > 0:
        return False, smoke_failures, "postdeploy-failure"
    assert artifact_promotions == 1
    return True, clean_builds, "immutable-deployment"
